blockingIssues.description: `BusinessDocumentTruths.salesOrderLifecycle` reports accounting status `PENDING` for any sales order with a workflow status even when the order has neither `fulfillmentInvoiceId` nor `salesJournalEntryId`, so linked-reference surfaces can still overstate accounting eligibility before dispatch/invoice truth exists.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify that Step 5 frontend-handoff/frontend-v2 updates are mandatory only when the feature actually changes a frontend-facing contract and no higher-priority mission instruction forbids doc edits.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: `truth-rails.shared-truth-contracts-and-state-split` completed successfully but had to deviate because the session instructions said not to update docs unless explicitly requested; its handoff skillFeedback documents the conflict.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify that Step 5 shared-knowledge/doc updates can be skipped when a higher-priority no-docs instruction applies and the feature preserves existing auth/admin request-response shapes.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: `truth-rails.restore-tenant-runtime-baseline` preserved the endpoint contract but still had to deviate from the skill's mandatory doc-update wording; the handoff records the justified conflict.

rejectedObservations.observation: The scrutiny-feature-reviewer Task droid intermittently failed to launch with `Invalid model: custom:CLIProxyAPI-5.4-high-pro`.
